rule_metadata.author: Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
rule_metadata.title: Logging Configuration Changes on Linux Host

rules.rule_text:
title: Logging Configuration Changes on Linux Host
id: c830f15d-6f6e-430f-8074-6f73d6807841
status: test
description: Detect changes of syslog daemons configuration files
references:
- self experience
author: Mikhail Larin, oscd.community
date: 2019-10-25
modified: 2021-11-27
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1562.006
logsource:
  product: linux
  service: auditd
detection:
  selection:
    type: PATH
    name:
    - /etc/syslog.conf
    - /etc/rsyslog.conf
    - /etc/syslog-ng/syslog-ng.conf
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate administrative activity
level: high
